page.title: Audit&Fix — Professional CRO Audit Reports
page.description: Find out why your website isn't converting. Get a professional CRO audit with zoomed-in screenshots of every problem — delivered in 24 hours.
hero.pre_headline: The average SMB website loses 60%+ of visitors at the first step.
hero.h1: Stop Losing Customers to a Website That Doesn't Convert
hero.subtitle: We screenshot every problem area on your site, score every key conversion factor using our proprietary methodology, and deliver a prioritised fix list — in plain English — within 24 hours.
hero.subtitle_emphasis: Every report reviewed by our senior analyst before delivery.
hero.usp: Proprietary scoring · Human judgement · Screenshots of key issues
hero_preview.alt: Sample Audit&Fix CRO audit report cover page
testimonials.1.quote: I had no idea my call-to-action button was buried below the fold on mobile. The report found it in minutes and we fixed it the same week — enquiries up 40%.
testimonials.1.author: Sarah T.
testimonials.2.quote: Straightforward, no fluff. We got a scored PDF with actual screenshots of our problem areas and a clear priority list. Our developer had it all fixed in two days.
testimonials.2.author: James K.
testimonials.3.quote: Worth every penny. The report caught that we had no trust signals above the fold at all — obvious in hindsight, but we'd been blind to it for years.
testimonials.3.author: Michelle R.
montage.title: Here's What You Actually Get
montage.subhead: A professional PDF with scored analysis, real screenshots from your site, and a ranked fix list — not a generic template.
montage.item4_caption: Prioritised fix list — quick wins first
props.1.title: Zoomed Screenshots of Every Problem
props.1.body: We screenshot the exact part of your page that's hurting conversions — so you can see it yourself, not just read about it.
props.2.title: Every Conversion Factor Scored A+ to F
props.2.body: Headline, CTA, trust signals, urgency and more — each scored independently, plus a full technical assessment of SSL, security, and mobile. You know exactly what to fix first.
props.3.title: Plain English, No Jargon
props.3.body: Written for business owners, not developers. Every finding explained with what it is, why it matters, and how to fix it.
props.4.title: $2,500 Elsewhere. $297 Here.
props.4.body: Professional CRO audits from agencies start at $2,500 and take 1–2 weeks. We deliver the same expert-level analysis — plus annotated screenshots — in 24 hours.
checklist.title: What's In Your Report
checklist.subhead: Each of the 10 conversion factors is scored 0–10 and graded A+ to F — so you know exactly where you stand and what to fix first.
checklist.1: Headline quality — does it communicate value in 3–5 seconds?
checklist.2: Value proposition — benefits, not features; "what's in it for me?"
checklist.3: Unique selling proposition — why choose you over alternatives?
checklist.6: Urgency & scarcity — legitimate pressure to act now
checklist.8: Imagery & design — authentic photos vs. generic stock
checklist.9: Offer clarity — do visitors know exactly what they get?
checklist.10: Industry appropriateness — does design fit your business model?
checklist.footer: Plus: zoomed screenshots of every problem area, a two-pass below-the-fold analysis, and a technical assessment covering SSL, security headers, and mobile responsiveness.
usp.title: Not a Checklist. Not a Sales Call. An Actual Report.
usp.p1: Free tools like Google Lighthouse score your page speed — they can't see that your headline is vague, your CTA is below the fold, or your trust signals are in the wrong place. Those are the things that actually kill conversions. We analyse all 10 of them, on the real visual page, calibrated across 10,000+ websites.
usp.p2: Unlike agency audits that cost $2,500–$15,000 and target enterprise clients, we're built for small business owners. Unlike Fiverr gigs that paste a Lighthouse screenshot into a Word doc, every report comes with zoomed annotated screenshots of your actual page — and a human-reviewed fix list in plain English.
urgency.title: Every day your site underconverts, you're losing leads you already paid for
urgency.p1: If your site converts at 1% and a fix pushes it to 2%, that's double the leads from the same traffic — zero extra ad spend. The average audit uncovers 3–5 issues fixable in under an hour each.
urgency.scarcity: ⏱ Reports are processed in batches, twice daily. Order before 8 pm to receive your report by the following morning.
expert.label: A note from your analyst
expert.name: Marcus Webb
expert.title: CRO Specialist & Marketing Strategist
expert.p1: Hi, I'm Marcus. Our team has 24 years of combined digital marketing experience — and we've seen the same conversion mistakes repeated across nearly every industry. Most small business websites look fine on the surface, but subtle issues in messaging, layout, and calls-to-action silently drive potential customers away.
expert.p2: We've worked with clients across retail, trades, health, and hospitality. Our edge? We combine hands-on marketing expertise with AI analysis calibrated across 10,000+ real business websites — catching issues that even experienced marketers miss.
expert.p3: Every report that comes through this system gets my eyes on it. If something doesn't look right, I flag it. You're not getting a PDF generated by a bot — you're getting a real audit backed by human judgement.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.1.q: How long until I get my report?
faq.1.a: Reports are delivered to the email you provide within 24 hours of payment. Most are delivered within a few hours during business hours.
faq.2.a: You'll receive a professional PDF (typically 9 pages) with scored analysis, zoomed screenshots of every problem area, and a prioritised fix list.
faq.3.q: What does the report actually show?
faq.3.a: For each of the 10 conversion factors, you get: a score (0–10), a grade (A+ to F), a plain-English explanation of what's wrong, and a specific recommendation. You also get actual zoomed screenshots showing the exact problem area on your page.
faq.4.q: What if my site is already performing well?
faq.4.a: Even high-scoring sites have room for improvement. Our report identifies specific optimisations regardless of your starting point. If you're genuinely satisfied there's nothing to act on, we offer a money-back guarantee.
faq.5.a: The report identifies and prioritises the issues — implementation is up to you or your developer. Most quick wins take under an hour to fix.
faq.6.q: How is this different from free tools like Google Lighthouse?
faq.6.a: Lighthouse scores your page speed and accessibility — useful, but it has nothing to do with conversions. It can't tell you if your headline is weak, your CTA is buried, or your trust signals are in the wrong place. Those are exactly what we analyse, on the real visual page, the way a visitor actually sees it.
faq.7.q: Is there a follow-up option after I've made changes?
faq.7.a: Yes — once you've implemented fixes, you can order a follow-up benchmarking audit at 50% of the original price to measure how much your score improved. It's a great way to prove ROI on your changes to stakeholders or clients.
faq.8.a: CTA stands for Call-to-Action — the button, link, or prompt that tells your visitor what to do next. Examples: "Get a Free Quote", "Book a Consultation", "Buy Now". A weak CTA (wrong wording, wrong colour, buried too low) is one of the most common and most fixable conversion killers. Our report scores your CTA and tells you exactly what to change.
footer_cta.h2: Ready to see what's holding your site back?
footer_cta.sub: 24-hour delivery · Money-back guarantee · Plain English, no jargon
footer.confidentiality: All audits are strictly confidential. We never publish, share, or resell client data.
